calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution Or Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Paul Melbostad for the Administrator Lisa Tresca.

Mr. Melbostad stated that the petition for final distribution was filed this morning with the hearing date of October 15, 2013. The status hearing is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution Or Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Lisa Tresca (Administrator).

Mr. Melbostad stated that they received a release from the final creditor on June 4th, that they can now prepare a petition for final distribution, that their goal is to do the petition by July 4th but asked for 30-days to be safe. Status on filing of the petition final distribution was continued to July 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mann.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution Or Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Continued To Jun-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Lisa Tresca.

Mr. Melbostad stated that they recently received refunds on two Franchise Tax Board claims ($30,000.00 and $17,000.00), that the Bank of America Creditor's Claim is settled, that he spoke to the Administrator and advised her to take the best offer on the other two outstanding Creditor's Claims and that they need 45 days to petition for final distribution. Mr. Melbostad also stated that they are waiting for release paper work to come back, that they got a one year extension on the condo conversion rights, that the property sold with said rights and that there is a small amount for distribution. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution was continued to June 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution Or Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Continued To Mar-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution Or Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Continued To Mar-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Herzfeld for Lisa Tresca.

Mr. Herzfeld requested a 6 month continuance stating that the Administrator signed an new
90-day listing agreement to put the property on the market and that the City gave them an extension to August for the condo conversion. Status on the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to March 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Continued To Jan-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Status of the Petition for Final Distribution or Status Report was continued to January 4, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner will notify the Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
